items.name: Roof repair
items.description: Fix leaks, damaged sections and roofing issues before they create larger property problems.

items.name: Roof replacement
items.description: Replace ageing or badly damaged roofing with a durable solution suited to the property.

items.name: Roof maintenance
items.description: Keep the roof in working order with proactive checks and maintenance that help prevent avoidable repairs.

items.name: Roof installation
items.description: Install roofing for residential and commercial properties with experienced roofing specialists.

items.name: Emergency storm and water damage repairs
items.description: Get 24-hour emergency help for storm damage, water ingress and urgent roof repair needs.

items.name: Roof restoration
items.description: Refresh and restore the roof to improve performance, appearance and long-term protection.

items.name: Roof gutter repair and cleaning
items.description: Repair and clear gutters so rainwater can drain properly and reduce the risk of water damage.

items.name: Skylight repairs
items.description: Repair skylight issues to help stop leaks and maintain natural light without compromising the roof.

brief.redesign_brief: Keep the clear Sydney Roofing Specialists name, direct phone-led calls to action, emergency roofing positioning, Google rating asset and the practical service categories already listed. Improve the site by replacing the thin one-page structure and default WordPress blog remnants with a stronger service-led layout, clearer quote flow, visible trust signals, suburb/service relevance, better mobile contact actions and more polished copy. The redesign matters because roofing customers are often urgent, comparison-driven and trust-sensitive, so the site needs to quickly prove credibility, make calling or requesting a quote effortless, and turn existing traffic into higher-quality enquiries.

ready_to_build_concerns: No street address found in supplied scrape.
No ABN, licence or insurance details found in supplied scrape.
No real customer testimonial quotes found despite a Testimonials navigation link.
Home page content appears thin and several sections may not have been fully captured.
Default WordPress hello-world post is still public.
Quote form country selector defaults to United States in scraped text.
Two different phone numbers appear across pages and should be confirmed before build.
Logo asset is a JPG, not SVG, and may need cleanup for high-quality redesign use.
